Moreover, average lifetime earnings over the age range 25 to 55 closely align with the same measure in Social Security Administration data. Our results suggest that the NLSY79 can continue to provide useful data for economists and other social scientists studying life-cycle and lifetime labor market outcomes, including earnings inequality.
32361.zh_abstract: 1979年，全国青年纵向调查1979（NLSY79）开始追踪一组出生于1957年至1964年间的美国居民。四十多年来，它持续对这些相同个体进行重新访谈。尽管抽样期很长，但样本流失仍然较小。本文表明，经过40年的数据收集，剩余的NLSY79样本在关键劳动力市场结果方面仍然广泛代表其全国同龄群体。对于NLSY79的年龄队列，就业、工作小时数和收入的生命周期曲线与当前人口调查中的曲线相当。此外，25至55岁年龄段的平均终身收入与社会保障管理局数据中的相同指标高度一致。我们的结果表明，NLSY79可以继续为经济学家和其他社会科学家研究生命周期和终身劳动力市场结果（包括收入不平等）提供有用的数据。

32360.title: Bargaining and Dynamic Competition
32360.authors: Shanglyu Deng, Dun Jia, Mario Leccese, Andrew Sweeting
32360.abstract: Industries with significant scale economies or learning-by-doing may come to be dominated by a single firm. Economists have studied how likely this is to happen, and whether it is efficient, using models where buyers are price or quantity takers, even though these industries are often also characterized by buyer-seller negotiations. We extend the dynamic “learning-by-doing and forgetting” model of Besanko, Doraszelski, Kryukov, and Satterthwaite (2010) to allow for Nash-in-Nash bargaining over prices. Price-taking and the social planner solution are captured as special cases. We show that sellers’ dynamic incentives, market concentration and welfare can change sharply, and non-monotonically, as one moves away from the price-taking assumption. We study the implications of buyer bargaining power for the existence of multiple equilibria, the design of subsidy policies and the welfare effects of policies designed to increase competition.
32360.zh_abstract: 具有显著规模经济或干中学效应的行业可能最终由单一企业主导。经济学家使用买方是价格接受者或数量接受者的模型研究了这种情况发生的可能性及其效率，尽管这些行业通常也以买卖双方谈判为特征。我们扩展了Besanko、Doraszelski、Kryukov和Satterthwaite（2010）的动态“干中学与遗忘”模型，以允许纳什-纳什讨价还价定价。价格接受和社会计划者解决方案作为特例被纳入。我们表明，随着偏离价格接受假设，卖方的动态激励、市场集中度和福利可能发生剧烈且非单调的变化。我们研究了买方议价能力对多重均衡存在性、补贴政策设计以及旨在增加竞争的政策的福利效应的影响。

32359.title: Technological Progress and Rent Seeking
32359.abstract: We model firms’ allocation of resources across surplus-creating (i.e., productive) and surplus-appropriating (i.e., rent-seeking) activities. Our model predicts that industry-wide technological advancements, such as recent progress in data collection and processing, induce a disproportionate and socially inefficient reallocation of resources toward surplus-appropriating activities. As technology improves, firms rely more on appropriation to obtain their profits, endogenously reducing the impact of technological progress on economic progress and inflating the price of the resources used for both types of activities. We apply our theoretical insights to shed light on the rise of high-frequency trading
32359.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个模型，分析企业在创造剩余（即生产性）活动与获取剩余（即寻租性）活动之间的资源配置。模型预测，行业层面的技术进步——例如近期在数据收集与处理方面的进展——会促使资源不成比例地、且在社会效率低下的情况下向获取剩余的活动重新配置。随着技术改进，企业更加依赖寻租行为来获取利润，这内生地削弱了技术进步对经济进步的影响，并抬高了用于两类活动的资源价格。我们运用理论洞见来阐释高频交易的兴起。

32357.title: Assessing the Costs of Balancing College and Work Activities: The Gig Economy Meets Online Education
32357.zh_title: 评估平衡大学学习与工作活动的成本：零工经济遇上在线教育
32357.authors: Esteban M. Aucejo, A. Spencer Perry, Basit Zafar
32357.abstract: Balancing the demands of work and schooling is a challenging task for an increasing number of students who have to pay their way through college and for workers who intend to upgrade their skills. However, flexible learning and working environments could play an important role in easing many frictions associated with performing both activities simultaneously. Using detailed (work and study effort) data -- from a partnership between Arizona State University and Uber that allows eligible drivers to enroll in online college courses for free -- we analyze how labor supply and study efforts respond to changes in labor market conditions and college activities/tasks. Our findings indicate that a 10% increase in average weekly online college activities reduces weekly time spent on the Uber platform by about 1%, indicating a low “short run” opportunity cost of studying when working. We also show that study time is not particularly sensitive to changes in labor market conditions, where a 10% increase in average weekly pay reduces study hours by only 2%. Consistent with these results, we find that workers take advantage of their flexible schedules by changing their usual working hours when their college courses are more demanding. We do not find adverse effects of work hours on academic performance in this context, or of study hours on workplace performance (as measured by driver ratings or tips). Finally, the (elicited) value assigned to flexible working and educational formats is high among the students in our sample, who view online education as an important vehicle for increasing expected future income. Overall, this study underscores that combining flexible working and learning formats could constitute a suitable path for many (lowSES) students who work to afford an increasingly expensive college education and for workers aiming to improve their skill set.
32357.zh_abstract: 对于越来越多需要自费上大学的学生以及希望提升技能的劳动者而言，平衡工作与学业需求是一项艰巨的任务。然而，灵活的学习和工作环境可能在缓解同时进行这两项活动所带来的诸多摩擦方面发挥重要作用。利用亚利桑那州立大学与优步合作（允许符合条件的司机免费注册在线大学课程）提供的详细（工作和学习努力）数据，我们分析了劳动力供给和学习努力如何响应劳动力市场状况及大学活动/任务的变化。我们的研究结果表明，平均每周在线大学活动增加10%，会导致每周在优步平台上花费的时间减少约1%，这表明工作时学习的“短期”机会成本较低。我们还发现，学习时间对劳动力市场状况的变化并不特别敏感，平均每周薪酬增加10%仅使学习时间减少2%。与这些结果一致，我们发现劳动者会利用其灵活的工作安排，在大学课程要求更高时改变通常的工作时间。在此背景下，我们未发现工作时间对学业成绩有不利影响，也未发现学习时间对工作表现（以司机评分或小费衡量）有不利影响。最后，在我们的样本学生中，他们对灵活工作和教育模式所赋予的（经诱导得出的）价值很高，他们将在线教育视为增加预期未来收入的重要途径。总体而言，这项研究强调，结合灵活的工作和学习模式，可能为许多通过工作来支付日益昂贵的大学费用的（低社会经济地位）学生以及旨在提升技能的劳动者提供一条合适的路径。

32356.title: Private Adoption of Public Good Technologies: The Case of PurpleAir
32356.zh_title: 公共物品技术的私人采用：以PurpleAir为例
32356.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Benjamin Krebs, Matthew J. Neidell
32356.abstract: We study the private adoption and diffusion of a technology that provides a local public good – PurpleAir (PA) pollution monitors. From a purely informational perspective, the ideal spacing of these monitors should reflect the degree of spatial correlation in pollution. In stark contrast, we find that monitor adoption is spatially highly clustered in less polluted areas, suggesting the marginal monitor adopted provides minimal additional public information. Moreover, monitor adoption mainly occurs in affluent, predominantly white neighborhoods, underscoring the potential environmental justice concerns associated with the private provision of this public good.
32356.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种提供地方公共物品的技术——PurpleAir污染监测仪——的私人采用与扩散。从纯粹的信息角度来看，这些监测仪的理想间距应反映污染的空间相关程度。然而，与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们发现监测仪的采用在空间上高度集中于污染较轻的地区，这表明边际上被采用的监测仪所提供的额外公共信息微乎其微。此外，监测仪的采用主要发生在富裕且以白人为主的社区，这凸显了私人提供这种公共物品可能引发的环境正义问题。

32355.title: Financial Literacy and Financial Education: An Overview
32355.zh_title: 金融素养与金融教育：概述
32355.abstract: This article provides a concise narrative overview of the rapidly growing empirical literature on financial literacy and financial education. We first discuss stylized facts on the demographic correlates of financial literacy. We next cover the evidence on the effects of financial literacy on financial behaviors and outcomes. Finally, we review the evidence on the causal effects of financial education programs focusing on randomized controlled trial evaluations. The article concludes with perspectives on future research priorities for both financial literacy and financial education.
32355.zh_abstract: 本文对快速增长的关于金融素养与金融教育的实证文献进行了简洁的叙述性概述。我们首先讨论了关于金融素养人口统计学相关性的典型事实。接着，我们涵盖了关于金融素养对金融行为和结果影响的证据。最后，我们回顾了关于金融教育项目因果效应的证据，重点关注随机对照试验评估。文章最后对金融素养和金融教育未来的研究重点提出了展望。

32354.title: Macroeconomics of Mental Health
32354.authors: Boaz Abramson, Job Boerma, Aleh Tsyvinski
32354.abstract: We develop an economic theory of mental health. The theory is grounded in classic and modern psychiatric literature, is disciplined with micro data, and is formalized in a life-cycle heterogeneous agent framework. In our model, individuals experiencing mental illness have pessimistic expectations and lose time due to rumination. As a result, they work less, consume less, invest less in risky assets, and forego treatment which in turn reinforces mental illness. We quantify the societal burden of mental illness and evaluate the efficacy of prominent policy proposals. We show that expanding the availability of treatment services and improving treatment of mental illness in late adolescence substantially improve mental health and welfare.
32354.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个关于心理健康的经济学理论。该理论植根于经典和现代精神病学文献，通过微观数据进行校准，并在生命周期异质性主体框架中形式化。在我们的模型中，经历精神疾病的个体持有悲观预期，并因反刍思维而损失时间。因此，他们工作更少、消费更少、对风险资产的投资更少，并且放弃治疗，这反过来又加剧了精神疾病。我们量化了精神疾病的社会负担，并评估了主要政策提案的有效性。我们表明，扩大治疗服务的可及性以及改善青少年晚期精神疾病的治疗，能够显著改善心理健康和福利。

32353.title: The Benefits and Costs of Secured Debt
32353.zh_title: 担保债务的收益与成本
32353.abstract: Secured debt—a debt contract that offers security to creditors in the form of collateralized assets—has been a cornerstone of credit markets in most societies since antiquity. The ability to seize and sell collateral reduces the creditor’s expected losses when the debtor defaults on a promised payment. Moreover, when a firm borrows from multiple creditors with different seniorities, debt secured by assets has higher priority relative to other creditors and is first in line for payment if the firm is bankrupt. While the benefits of secured debt have been shown in both the theoretical and empirical literature, less is known about the costs associated with secured borrowing. This paper surveys the burgeoning empirical literature on secured debt and provides an assessment of the costs and benefits of secured debt.
32353.zh_abstract: 担保债务——一种以抵押资产形式向债权人提供担保的债务合约——自古以来就是大多数社会信贷市场的基石。扣押和出售抵押品的能力减少了债务人违约未支付款项时债权人的预期损失。此外，当一家公司向具有不同优先级的多个债权人借款时，以资产担保的债务相对于其他债权人具有更高的优先级，并在公司破产时优先获得偿付。尽管理论和实证文献都已证明了担保债务的收益，但关于担保借款相关成本的认识仍然不足。本文调查了关于担保债务的新兴实证文献，并对担保债务的成本与收益进行了评估。

32352.title: Return Migration and Human Capital Flows
32352.zh_title: 回流移民与人力资本流动
32352.authors: Naser Amanzadeh, Amir Kermani, Timothy McQuade
32352.abstract: We bring to bear a novel dataset covering the employment history of about 450 million individuals from 180 countries to study return migration and the impact of skilled international migration on human capital stocks across countries. Return migration is a common phenomenon, with 38% of skilled migrants returning to their origin countries within 10 years. Return migration is significantly correlated with industry growth in the origin and destination countries, and is asymmetrically exposed to negative firm employment growth. Using an AKM-style model, we identify worker and country-firm fixed effects, as well as the returns to experience and education by location and current workplace. For workers in emerging economies, the returns to a year of experience in the United States are 59-204% higher than a year of experience in the origin country. Migrants to advanced economies are positively selected on ability relative to stayers, while within this migrant population, returnees exhibit lower ability. Simulations suggest that eliminating skilled international migration would have highly heterogeneous effects across countries, adjusting total (average) human capital stocks within a range of -60% to 40% (-3% to 4%).
32352.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个涵盖来自180个国家约4.5亿人就业历史的新数据集，研究回流移民以及技能型国际移民对各国人力资本存量的影响。回流移民是一种常见现象，38%的技能型移民在10年内返回其原籍国。回流移民与原籍国和目的国的行业增长显著相关，并且不对称地暴露于负面的企业就业增长。使用AKM风格模型，我们识别了工人和国家-企业固定效应，以及按地点和当前工作场所划分的经验和教育回报。对于新兴经济体的工人而言，在美国一年经验的回报比在原籍国一年经验的回报高出59-204%。移民到发达经济体的人在能力上相对于留守者呈正向选择，而在此移民群体内部，回流移民表现出较低的能力。模拟表明，消除技能型国际移民将对各国产生高度异质性的影响，使总（平均）人力资本存量在-60%至40%（-3%至4%）的范围内调整。
32352.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：F22, J61, O15

32351.title: Balancing Federalism: The Impact of Decentralizing School Accountability
32351.zh_title: 平衡联邦制：分散学校问责制的影响
32351.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Patricia Saenz-Armstrong, Alejandra Salazar
32351.abstract: Education policy, while primarily the responsibility of the state governments, involves complicated decision making at the local, state, and federal levels. The federal involvement dramatically increased with the introduction of test-based accountability under the No Child Left Behind Act of 2001. But, reflecting resistance to various parts of this law, the involvement of federal policy making was substantially reduced when Congress passed the Every Student Succeeds Act in 2015. This change in policy allows estimation of the impact of altered federalism. By looking at how states reacted to their enhanced decision-making role, we see a retreat from the use of output-based policy toward teachers, and this retreat was associated with significantly lower student achievement growth. As a result, this readjustment of federalism to decision making by lower levels appeared to lower national achievement. The snapshot of federalism impacts here is a lower bound on the effects as more states will very likely react to the flexibility of ESSA and as more school districts change their teacher force.
32351.zh_abstract: 教育政策虽然主要由州政府负责，但涉及地方、州和联邦层面的复杂决策。随着2001年《不让一个孩子掉队法案》引入基于考试的问责制，联邦政府的参与度大幅增加。然而，由于对该法案各部分的抵制，当国会于2015年通过《每个学生成功法案》时，联邦政策制定的参与度显著降低。这一政策变化使得我们能够评估联邦制调整的影响。通过观察各州如何应对其增强的决策角色，我们发现各州在针对教师的政策上从基于产出的方式后退，而这种后退与显著较低的学生成绩增长相关。因此，这种将联邦制调整为更低层级决策的做法似乎降低了全国范围内的学业成就。这里呈现的联邦制影响快照是影响的下限，因为更多州很可能会对ESSA的灵活性做出反应，并且更多学区会改变其教师队伍。
32351.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H1, H7, I20

32350.title: The Gender Concealment Gap
32350.authors: Christine L. Exley, Raymond Fisman, Judd B. Kessler, Louis-Pierre Lepage, Xiaomeng Li, Corinne Low, Xiaoyue Shan, Mattie Toma, Basit Zafar
32350.abstract: We identify and explore a gender concealment gap when individuals have the opportunity to hide information about their performance from others. In data from two universities that allowed students to replace letter grades with “credit” on their transcripts, we find that men are substantially more likely than women to conceal grades that will harm their GPAs. The gender concealment gap persists across student traits and course features and generates inequity: the option to conceal leads to GPA gains that are 50% larger for men than for women. University data and complementary experimental evidence suggests that women may conceal less because they expect others will make worse inferences about their concealed grades.
32350.zh_abstract: 我们识别并探讨了当个体有机会向他人隐藏其表现信息时存在的性别隐藏差距。来自两所大学的数据显示，学生可以用“学分”替代成绩单上的字母等级，我们发现男性比女性更倾向于隐藏会损害其GPA的成绩。这种性别隐藏差距在不同学生特征和课程特征中持续存在，并导致了不平等：隐藏选项带来的GPA提升，男性比女性高出50%。大学数据和补充实验证据表明，女性隐藏较少可能是因为她们预期他人会对其隐藏的成绩做出更差的推断。

32349.title: Mask Mandate Costs
32349.authors: Patrick Carlin, Shyam Raman, Kosali I. Simon, Ryan Sullivan, Coady Wing
32349.abstract: This paper presents the results from a hypothetical set of questions related to mask-wearing behavior and opinions that were asked of a nationally representative sample of over 4,000 participants in early 2022. Mask mandates were hotly debated in public discourse, and though much research exists on benefits of masks, there has been no research thus far on the distribution of perceived costs of compliance. As is common in economic research that aims to assess the value to society of non-market activities, we use survey valuation methods and ask how much participants would be willing to pay to be exempted from rules of mandatory community masking. The survey asks specifically about a 3 month exemption. We find that the majority of respondents (56%) are not willing to pay to be exempted from mandatory masking. However, the average person was willing to pay $\$525,$ and a small segment of the population (0.9%) stated they were willing to pay over $\$5,000$ to be exempted from the mandate. Younger respondents stated higher willingness to pay to avoid the mandate than older respondents. Combining our results with standard measures of the value of a statistical life, we estimate that a 3 month masking order was perceived as cost effective through willingness-to-pay questions only if at least 13,333 lives were saved by the policy.
32349.zh_abstract: 本文展示了2022年初对超过4000名全国代表性样本参与者进行的一组关于口罩佩戴行为和意见的假设性问题的调查结果。口罩强制令在公共讨论中备受争议，尽管关于口罩益处的研究很多，但迄今为止尚无关于合规感知成本分布的研究。与旨在评估非市场活动社会价值的经济学研究常见做法一样，我们使用调查估值方法，询问参与者愿意支付多少费用以豁免于社区强制口罩规定。调查特别询问了三个月的豁免期。我们发现，大多数受访者（56%）不愿意为豁免强制口罩而付费。然而，平均每人愿意支付525美元，一小部分人群（0.9%）表示愿意支付超过5000美元以豁免于该强制令。年轻受访者比年长受访者表示愿意支付更高的金额以避免强制令。结合我们的结果与统计生命价值的标准衡量标准，我们估计，只有当该政策至少挽救13,333条生命时，三个月的口罩强制令才通过意愿支付问题被视为具有成本效益。

32348.title: Examiner and Judge Designs in Economics: A Practitioner's Guide
32348.zh_title: 经济学中的审查员与法官设计：实践者指南
32348.authors: Eric Chyn, Brigham Frandsen, Emily C. Leslie
32348.abstract: This article provides empirical researchers with an introduction and guide to research designs based on variation in judge and examiner tendencies to administer treatments or other interventions. We review the basic theory behind the research design, outline the assumptions under which the design identifies causal effects, describe empirical tests of those assumptions, and discuss tradeoffs associated with choices researchers must make for estimation. We demonstrate concepts and best practices concretely in an empirical case study that uses an examiner tendency research design to study the effects of pre-trial detention.
32348.zh_abstract: 本文为实证研究人员提供了基于法官和审查员在实施处理或其他干预措施方面倾向性差异的研究设计的介绍和指南。我们回顾了该研究设计背后的基本理论，概述了该设计识别因果效应的假设条件，描述了这些假设的实证检验方法，并讨论了研究人员在估计过程中必须做出的选择所涉及的权衡。我们通过一个实证案例研究具体展示了概念和最佳实践，该案例使用审查员倾向性研究设计来研究审前拘留的影响。
32348.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C21, C26, C31, C54, K14

32347.title: A Field Experiment on Antitrust Compliance
32347.zh_title: 反垄断合规的实地实验
32347.abstract: We study the effectiveness of firms' compliance programs by conducting a field experiment in which we disclose to a subset of Japanese firms that the firm is potentially engaging in illegal bid-rigging. We find that the information that we disclose affects the bidding behavior of the treated firms: our test of bid-rigging is less able to reject the null of competition when applied to the bidding data of the treated firms after the intervention. We find evidence that this change is not the result of firms ceasing to collude, however. We find evidence suggesting that firms continue to collude even after our intervention and that the change in the bidding behavior we document is the result of active concealment of evidence by cartelizing firms.
32347.zh_abstract: 我们通过进行一项实地实验来研究企业合规计划的有效性，在该实验中，我们向一部分日本企业披露，该企业可能正在从事非法的串通投标行为。我们发现，我们披露的信息影响了受处理企业的投标行为：在干预后，当应用于受处理企业的投标数据时，我们的串通投标检验更难以拒绝竞争的零假设。然而，我们发现有证据表明，这种变化并非企业停止合谋的结果。证据表明，即使在我们干预之后，企业仍在继续合谋，并且我们所记录的投标行为变化是合谋企业积极隐藏证据的结果。

32346.title: Human Capital Spillovers and Health: Does Living Around College Graduates Lengthen Life?
32346.zh_title: 人力资本溢出与健康：生活在大学毕业生周围能延长寿命吗？
32346.authors: Jacob H. Bor, David M. Cutler, Edward L. Glaeser, Ljubica Ristovska
32346.abstract: Equally educated people are healthier if they live in more educated places. Every 10 percent point increase in an area’s share of adults with a college degree is associated with a decline in all-cause mortality by 7%, controlling for individual education, demographics, and area characteristics. Area human capital is also associated with lower disease prevalence and improvements in self-reported health. The association between area education and health increased greatly between 1990 and 2010. Spatial sorting does not drive these externalities; there is little evidence that sicker people move disproportionately into less educated areas. Differences in health-related amenities, ranging from hospital quality to pollution, explain no more than 17% of the area human capital spillovers on health. Over half of the correlation between area human capital and health is a result of the correlation between area human capital and smoking and obesity. More educated areas have stricter regulations regarding smoking and more negative beliefs about smoking. These have translated over time into a population that smokes noticeably less and that is less obese, leading to increasing divergence in health outcomes by area education.
32346.zh_abstract: 同等教育水平的人如果生活在受教育程度更高的地方，会更健康。在控制个人教育水平、人口统计特征和地区特征后，一个地区拥有大学学位的成年人比例每提高10个百分点，全因死亡率就会下降7%。地区人力资本也与较低的疾病患病率和自评健康状况的改善相关。地区教育与健康之间的关联在1990年至2010年间大幅增加。空间分类并不能驱动这些外部性；几乎没有证据表明病人会不成比例地迁移到受教育程度较低的地区。从医院质量到污染等健康相关便利设施的差异，最多只能解释地区人力资本对健康溢出效应的17%。地区人力资本与健康之间超过一半的相关性是由地区人力资本与吸烟和肥胖之间的相关性造成的。受教育程度更高的地区对吸烟有更严格的规定，并且对吸烟有更负面的看法。随着时间的推移，这些因素导致这些地区的人口吸烟率显著降低，肥胖率也较低，从而导致按地区教育程度划分的健康结果差异不断扩大。
32346.meta: Programs：AG, ED, EH；JEL：I12, I18, I24, I26, R10

32343.title: Work Requirements and Child Tax Benefits
32343.zh_title: 工作要求与儿童税收优惠
32343.authors: Jacob Goldin, Tatiana Homonoff, Neel A. Lal, Ithai Lurie, Katherine Michelmore, Matthew Unrath
32343.abstract: Many U.S. safety-net programs condition benefit eligibility on work. Eliminating work requirements would better target benefits to the neediest families but attenuates pro-work incentives. Using administrative records, we study how expanding a California child tax credit to non-workers affected maternal labor supply. We rely on quasi-random birth-timing and a novel method for using placebo analyses to maximize estimator precision. Eliminating the work requirement caused very few mothers to exit the labor force; our 95% confidence interval excludes reductions over one-third of one percent. Our results suggest expanding tax benefits to the lowest-income families need not meaningfully reduce workforce participation.
32343.zh_abstract: 美国许多安全网项目将福利资格与工作挂钩。取消工作要求可以更好地将福利瞄准最需要帮助的家庭，但会削弱促进工作的激励。利用行政记录，我们研究了将加州儿童税收抵免扩大到非工作者对母亲劳动供给的影响。我们依赖于准随机的生育时机以及一种使用安慰剂分析来最大化估计精度的新方法。取消工作要求导致极少数母亲退出劳动力市场；我们的95%置信区间排除了超过三分之一百分点的减少。我们的结果表明，将税收优惠扩大到最低收入家庭未必会显著降低劳动力参与率。

32391.title: Upward Mobility in Developing Countries
32391.zh_title: 发展中国家的向上流动性
32391.authors: Garance Genicot, Debraj Ray, Carolina Concha-Arriagada
32391.abstract: This article provides an overview of the literature on mobility in developing countries. Explicit distinctions are drawn between directional and non-directional measures, absolute and relative measures, and combinations thereof. We note that the scarcity of panel data has hindered the measurement of mobility for many countries. We pay particular attention to the recent development of panel-free mobility measures, which allows us to measure upward mobility in 122 countries. Throughout this review, we discuss some central themes in the literature.
32391.zh_abstract: 本文综述了关于发展中国家流动性的文献。我们明确区分了方向性与非方向性指标、绝对与相对指标及其组合。我们注意到，面板数据的匮乏阻碍了许多国家流动性的测量。我们特别关注近期发展的无面板流动性指标，这使得我们能够衡量122个国家的向上流动性。在整个综述中，我们讨论了文献中的一些核心主题。

32390.title: Loopholes and the Incidence of Public Services: Evidence from Funding Career & Technical Education
32390.zh_title: 漏洞与公共服务的归宿：来自职业与技术教育资助的证据
32390.authors: Thomas Goldring, Brian Jacob, Daniel Kreisman, Michael Ricks
32390.abstract: In 2015, Michigan increased its Career and Technical Education (CTE) funding and changed its funding formula to reimburse programs-based student progression through program curricula. Although this change nearly doubled program completion rates, student enrollment and persistence were unaffected; instead, administrators accelerated student progress by reorganizing course curricula around notches in the new funding formula. As a result of response heterogeneity, 30% of the funding increase is transferred away from high-poverty districts to more affluent ones, underscoring how supply-side responses to loopholes shape the incidence of public services.
32390.zh_abstract: 2015年，密歇根州增加了职业与技术教育（CTE）资助，并改变了资助公式，根据学生完成课程大纲的进度来报销项目。尽管这一变化使项目完成率几乎翻倍，但学生入学率和持续学习率并未受到影响；相反，管理人员通过围绕新资助公式中的节点重组课程大纲，加速了学生进度。由于反应的异质性，30%的资助增加额从高贫困学区转移到了更富裕的学区，这突显了供给侧对漏洞的反应如何塑造公共服务的归宿。
32390.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I20, I21, I22

32389.title: Immigration's Effect on US Wages and Employment Redux
32389.zh_title: 移民对美国工资和就业影响的再探讨
32389.abstract: In this article we revive, extend and improve the approach used in a series of influential papers written in the 2000s to estimate how changes in the supply of immigrant workers affected natives' wages in the US. We begin by extending the analysis to include the more recent years 2000-2022. Additionally, we introduce three important improvements. First, we introduce an IV that uses a new skill-based shift-share for immigrants and the demographic evolution for natives, which we show passes validity tests and has reasonably strong power. Second, we provide estimates of the impact of immigration on the employment-population ratio of natives to test for crowding out at the national level. Third, we analyze occupational upgrading of natives in response to immigrants. Using these estimates, we calculate that immigration, thanks to native-immigrant complementarity and college skill content of immigrants, had a positive and significant effect between +1.7 to +2.6\\% on wages of less educated native workers, over the period 2000-2019 and no significant wage effect on college educated natives. We also calculate a positive employment rate effect for most native workers. Even simulations for the most recent 2019-2022 period suggest small positive effects on wages of non-college natives and no significant crowding out effects on employment.
32389.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们复兴、扩展并改进了2000年代一系列有影响力的论文中使用的方法，以估计移民工人供给变化如何影响美国本土工人的工资。我们首先将分析扩展到包括最近的2000-2022年。此外，我们引入了三项重要改进。第一，我们引入了一个工具变量，该变量使用基于移民的新技能份额转移和本土人口演变，我们证明其通过了有效性检验并具有相当强的解释力。第二，我们提供了移民对本土工人就业人口比影响的估计，以检验国家层面的挤出效应。第三，我们分析了本土工人为应对移民而进行的职业升级。利用这些估计，我们计算出，由于本土与移民的互补性以及移民的大学技能含量，在2000-2019年期间，移民对受教育程度较低的本土工人工资产生了显著的正向影响，幅度在+1.7%至+2.6%之间，而对受过大学教育的本土工人没有显著的工资影响。我们还计算出对大多数本土工人有正的就业率效应。即使对最近的2019-2022年期间的模拟也表明，移民对非大学学历本土工人的工资有小的正向影响，且没有显著的就业挤出效应。

32388.title: Teaching Teachers To Use Computer Assisted Learning Effectively: Experimental and Quasi-Experimental Evidence
32388.zh_title: 有效教授教师使用计算机辅助学习：实验与准实验证据
32388.authors: Philip Oreopoulos, Chloe Gibbs, Michael Jensen, Joseph Price
32388.abstract: Mastery learning - the process by which students must demonstrate proficiency with a single topic before moving on - is well recognized as one of the most effective ways to learn, yet many teachers struggle or remain unsure about how to implement it into a classroom setting. This study evaluates a program to encourage greater mastery learning through technology and proactive continuous teacher support. Focusing on elementary and middle school mathematics, teachers receive weekly coaching in how to use Computer Assisted Learning (CAL) for helping students follow a customized roadmap of incremental progress. Results from two field experiments indicate significant Intent To Treat effects on math performance of 0.12 - 0.22 standard deviations. Further analysis indicates that these gains are from students in classrooms with at least an average of 35 minutes of practice per week. Teachers able to achieve high-dosage practice have a high degree of initial buy-in, a clear implementation strategy for when practice occurs, and a willingness to closely monitor progress and follow-up with struggling students.
32388.zh_abstract: 掌握学习——即学生必须在进入下一个主题之前证明对单个主题的熟练程度——被公认为最有效的学习方式之一，然而许多教师仍难以或不确定如何在课堂环境中实施它。本研究评估了一个通过技术和主动持续教师支持来鼓励更多掌握学习的项目。聚焦于中小学数学，教师每周接受辅导，学习如何使用计算机辅助学习（CAL）帮助学生遵循定制的渐进进步路线图。来自两个现场实验的结果表明，对数学成绩的意向治疗效应显著，为0.12至0.22个标准差。进一步分析表明，这些收益来自每周平均至少进行35分钟练习的课堂中的学生。能够实现高剂量练习的教师具有高度的初始认同感、明确的练习实施策略，以及密切监控进度并跟进困难学生的意愿。

32387.title: The Dollar versus the Euro as International Reserve Currencies
32387.zh_title: 美元与欧元作为国际储备货币的比较
32387.authors: Menzie D. Chinn, Jeffrey A. Frankel, Hiro Ito
32387.abstract: We begin by examining determinants of aggregate foreign exchange reserve holdings by central banks (size of issuing country’s economy and financial markets, ability of the currency to hold value, and inertia). But understanding the determination of reserve holdings probably requires going beyond the aggregate numbers, instead observing individual central bank behavior, including characteristics of the holding country (bilateral trade with the issuing country, bilateral currency peg, and proxies for bilateral exposure to sanctions), in addition to the characteristics of the reserve currency issuer. On a currency-by-currency basis, US dollar holdings are somewhat well explained by several issuer characteristics; but the other currencies are less successfully explained. It may be that the results from currency-by-currency estimation are impaired by insufficient sample size. This consideration offers a motivation for pooling the data across the major currencies and imposing the constraints that reserve holdings are determined in the same way for each currency. In this setting, most economic determinants enter with significance: economic size as measured by GDP, size of financial markets as measured by foreign exchange turnover, bilateral currency peg, and bilateral trade share. However, geopolitical variables (bilateral alliance, bilateral sanctions) usually do not enter with significance.
32387.zh_abstract: 我们首先考察中央银行外汇储备总量的决定因素（发行国经济和金融市场的规模、货币保值能力以及惯性）。但理解储备持有的决定可能还需要超越总量数字，转而观察单个中央银行的行为，包括持有国的特征（与发行国的双边贸易、双边货币挂钩以及双边制裁暴露的代理变量），以及储备货币发行国的特征。在逐个货币的基础上，美元持有量在一定程度上可以由几个发行国特征较好地解释；但其他货币的解释效果较差。这可能是因为逐个货币估计的结果因样本量不足而受损。这一考虑为将主要货币的数据合并并施加约束（即每种货币的储备持有以相同方式决定）提供了动机。在这种设定下，大多数经济决定因素具有显著性：以GDP衡量的经济规模、以外汇交易量衡量的金融市场规模、双边货币挂钩以及双边贸易份额。然而，地缘政治变量（双边联盟、双边制裁）通常不显著。

32386.title: The Rise and Fall of the Teaching Profession: Prestige, Interest, Preparation, and Satisfaction over the Last Half Century
32386.zh_title: 教师职业的兴衰：过去半个世纪的声望、兴趣、准备与满意度
32386.authors: Matthew A. Kraft, Melissa Arnold Lyon
32386.abstract: We examine the state of the U.S. K-12 teaching profession over the last half century by compiling nationally representative time-series data on four interrelated constructs: occupational prestige, interest among students, the number of individuals preparing for entry, and on-the-job satisfaction. We find a consistent and dynamic pattern across every measure: a rapid decline in the 1970s, a swift rise in the 1980s extending into the mid 1990s, relative stability, and then a sustained decline beginning around 2010. The current state of the teaching profession is at or near its lowest levels in 50 years. We identify and explore a range of hypotheses that might explain these historical patterns including economic and sociopolitical factors, education policies, and school environments.
32386.zh_abstract: 我们通过汇编具有全国代表性的时间序列数据，考察了过去半个世纪美国K-12教师职业的状况，这些数据涉及四个相互关联的构念：职业声望、学生兴趣、准备入职的人数以及在职满意度。我们发现每个指标都呈现出一致且动态的模式：1970年代迅速下降，1980年代迅速上升并持续到1990年代中期，随后相对稳定，然后从2010年左右开始持续下降。教师职业的当前状态处于或接近50年来的最低水平。我们识别并探讨了一系列可能解释这些历史模式的假设，包括经济和社会政治因素、教育政策以及学校环境。

32385.title: Ethics and Illusions: How Ethical Declarations Shape Market Behavior
32385.zh_title: 伦理与幻觉：伦理声明如何塑造市场行为
32385.authors: John M. Barrios, Jeremy Bertomeu, Radhika Lunawat, Ibrahima Sall
32385.abstract: We examine the impacts of ethical declarations on market transactions through a controlled laboratory experiment, where privately-informed sellers issue a public report prior to a first-price auction. We find that while signing an ethical statement does not reduce misreporting by sellers, it significantly increases buyer trust, often skewing the terms of the trade in favor of sellers. Contrary to rational expectations, buyers consistently struggle to undo the bias. In counterfactual scenarios, from our structural analysis, we find that price efficiency improves when buyers rationally process uncertainty about sellers' ethical preferences, yet bias persists even when buyers have more accurate perceptions of sellers'’ ethical standards. Overall, our results suggests that disclosure interventions aimed at enhancing ethical conduct in market settings may not necessarily lead to more efficient pricing or reduced bias, and in some instances, may even disadvantage certain market participants.
32385.zh_abstract: 我们通过一个受控的实验室实验，考察伦理声明对市场交易的影响，其中拥有私人信息的卖方在首价拍卖前发布公开报告。我们发现，虽然签署伦理声明并未减少卖方的虚假报告，但它显著增加了买方的信任，往往使交易条件向卖方倾斜。与理性预期相反，买方始终难以纠正这种偏差。在我们的结构分析的反事实情景中，我们发现当买方理性处理关于卖方伦理偏好的不确定性时，价格效率会提高，但即使买方对卖方的伦理标准有更准确的认知，偏差仍然存在。总体而言，我们的结果表明，旨在增强市场环境中伦理行为的披露干预措施，不一定能带来更有效的定价或减少偏差，在某些情况下，甚至可能使某些市场参与者处于不利地位。
32385.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LE；JEL：D53, G10, G14, G4, G41

32384.title: Gaining Steam: Incumbent Lock-in and Entrant Leapfrogging
32384.zh_title: 获得蒸汽动力：在位者锁定与进入者跨越
32384.authors: Richard Hornbeck, Shanon Hsuan-Ming Hsu, Anders Humlum, Martin Rotemberg
32384.abstract: We examine the long transition from water to steam power in US manufacturing, focusing on early users of mechanical power: lumber and flour mills. Digitizing Census of Manufactures manuscripts for 1850 to 1880, we show that as steam costs declined, manufacturing activity grew faster in counties with less waterpower potential. This growth was driven by steam powered entrants and agglomeration, as water powered incumbents faced switching barriers primarily from sunk costs. Estimating a dynamic model of firm entry and steam adoption, we find that the interaction of switching barriers and high fixed costs creates a quantitatively important and socially inefficient drag on technology adoption. Despite substantial entry and exit, switching barriers remained influential for aggregate steam adoption throughout the 19th century, as water power required lower fixed costs and therefore was attractive to relatively low productivity entrants. These entrants then became incumbents, locked into water power even if their productivity grew.
32384.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国制造业从水动力到蒸汽动力的长期转型，重点关注机械动力的早期使用者：木材厂和面粉厂。通过数字化1850年至1880年制造业普查手稿，我们表明，随着蒸汽成本下降，制造业活动在水力潜力较低的县增长更快。这种增长是由蒸汽动力进入者和集聚效应驱动的，而水动力在位者面临主要来自沉没成本的转换障碍。通过估计企业进入和蒸汽采用的动态模型，我们发现转换障碍与高固定成本的相互作用，对技术采用产生了数量上重要且社会效率低下的拖累。尽管存在大量的进入和退出，转换障碍在整个19世纪对总体蒸汽采用仍然具有影响力，因为水动力需要较低的固定成本，因此对生产率相对较低的进入者具有吸引力。这些进入者随后成为在位者，即使其生产率增长，也被锁定在水动力中。
32384.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EEE, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D25, N61, O14

32383.title: Do Female–Owned Employment Agencies Mitigate Discrimination and Expand Opportunity for Women?
32383.zh_title: 女性拥有的就业中介能否减少歧视并为女性扩大机会？
32383.abstract: We create a dataset of 14,000 help–wanted advertisements placed by U.S. employment agencies in 1950 and 1960, when help–wanted advertisements specified gender, and collect information on agency ownership. Female–owned agencies specialized in vacancies for women, expanding access of female job–seekers to agency services. They also advertised more skilled occupations to women than did male–owned agencies, leading to 5% higher wages for women. But they advertised more clerical jobs to men, contributing to 17% lower male wages. However, the gender wage gap within agency was the same for female-and male–owned agencies, suggesting no mitigation of discrimination.
32383.zh_abstract: 我们创建了一个数据集，包含1950年和1960年美国就业中介发布的14000条招聘广告（当时招聘广告会注明性别），并收集了中介所有权的信息。女性拥有的中介专注于为女性提供职位空缺，扩大了女性求职者获得中介服务的机会。与男性拥有的中介相比，它们还向女性宣传更多技能型职业，导致女性工资高出5%。但它们向男性宣传更多文职工作，导致男性工资降低17%。然而，在中介内部，女性和男性拥有的中介的性别工资差距相同，这表明歧视并未得到缓解。

32382.title: Social Protection in the Developing World
32382.zh_title: 发展中国家的社会保护
32382.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Rema Hanna, Benjamin A. Olken, Diana Sverdlin Lisker
32382.abstract: Social protection programs have become increasingly widespread in low- and middle-income countries, with their own distinct characteristics to match the environments in which they are operating. This paper reviews the growing literature on the design and impact of these programs. We review how to identify potential beneficiaries given the large informal sector, the design and implementation of redistribution and income support programs, and the challenges and potential of social insurance. We use our frameworks as a guide for consolidating and organizing the existing literature, and also to highlight areas and questions for future research.
32382.zh_abstract: 社会保护项目在低收入和中等收入国家变得越来越普遍，并具有与其运行环境相匹配的独特特征。本文回顾了关于这些项目设计和影响的日益增长的文献。我们探讨了在存在大量非正规部门的情况下如何识别潜在受益者、再分配和收入支持项目的设计与实施，以及社会保险面临的挑战和潜力。我们利用我们的框架作为指南来整合和组织现有文献，同时也强调未来研究的领域和问题。

32381.title: Automated Social Science: Language Models as Scientist and Subjects
32381.zh_title: 自动化社会科学：作为科学家和主体的大语言模型
32381.authors: Benjamin S. Manning, Kehang Zhu, John J. Horton
32381.abstract: We present an approach for automatically generating and testing, in silico, social scientific hypotheses. This automation is made possible by recent advances in large language models (LLM), but the key feature of the approach is the use of structural causal models. Structural causal models provide a language to state hypotheses, a blueprint for constructing LLM-based agents, an experimental design, and a plan for data analysis. The fitted structural causal model becomes an object available for prediction or the planning of follow-on experiments. We demonstrate the approach with several scenarios: a negotiation, a bail hearing, a job interview, and an auction. In each case, causal relationships are both proposed and tested by the system, finding evidence for some and not others. We provide evidence that the insights from these simulations of social interactions are not available to the LLM purely through direct elicitation. When given its proposed structural causal model for each scenario, the LLM is good at predicting the signs of estimated effects, but it cannot reliably predict the magnitudes of those estimates. In the auction experiment, the in silico simulation results closely match the predictions of auction theory, but elicited predictions of the clearing prices from the LLM are inaccurate. However, the LLM's predictions are dramatically improved if the model can condition on the fitted structural causal model. In short, the LLM knows more than it can (immediately) tell.
32381.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种在计算机中自动生成和检验社会科学假设的方法。这种自动化得益于大语言模型的最新进展，但该方法的关键特征是使用结构因果模型。结构因果模型提供了一种陈述假设的语言、构建基于大语言模型主体的蓝图、实验设计以及数据分析计划。拟合后的结构因果模型成为一个可用于预测或规划后续实验的对象。我们通过几个场景演示了该方法：谈判、保释听证会、求职面试和拍卖。在每种情况下，因果关系都由系统提出并检验，发现了一些证据，而另一些则没有。我们提供的证据表明，这些社会互动模拟的见解无法通过直接引出纯粹从大语言模型中获得。当给定其为每个场景提出的结构因果模型时，大语言模型善于预测估计效应的符号，但无法可靠地预测这些估计值的大小。在拍卖实验中，计算机模拟结果与拍卖理论的预测非常吻合，但从大语言模型中引出的清算价格预测却不准确。然而，如果模型能够以拟合的结构因果模型为条件，那么大语言模型的预测会得到显著改善。简而言之，大语言模型知道的比它（立即）能说出来的要多。

32380.title: The Impact of Lump-Sum Retirement Withdrawals on Labor Supply: Evidence from Peru
32380.zh_title: 一次性退休取款对劳动供给的影响：来自秘鲁的证据
32380.abstract: We examine the labor supply impact of a 2016 policy that allows retirement-eligible individuals covered by Peru’s private pension system to receive retirement benefits as a lump sum rather than as an annuity. We present a theoretical model predicting that, for liquidity constrained workers, the lump sum option makes formal employment (requiring pension participation) more attractive relative to informal employment (not requiring pension participation); it also encourages early retirement. Using household panel data, we estimate the impact of the 2016 policy on the labor supply of workers covered by the private pension system compared to workers covered by the alternative pay-as-you-go defined benefit pension (which was unaffected by the policy). The policy is associated with an increase in the probability of being retired at ages 50 (early retirement age for women), 55 (early retirement age for men), and 65 (full retirement age for all workers). We also find increases in formal sector employment among women in their late 40s and men in their early 50s, consistent with increased efforts to qualify for early retirement (which requires recent pension contributions). The policy’s effects are concentrated among workers with less education, who are more likely to be liquidity constrained.
32380.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2016年一项政策对劳动供给的影响，该政策允许秘鲁私人养老金体系覆盖的符合退休条件的个人以一次性付款而非年金的形式领取退休福利。我们提出了一个理论模型，预测对于面临流动性约束的工人来说，一次性付款选项使正规就业（需要参与养老金）相对于非正规就业（不需要参与养老金）更具吸引力；同时它也鼓励提前退休。利用家庭面板数据，我们估计了2016年政策对私人养老金体系覆盖工人劳动供给的影响，并与受替代的现收现付制固定收益养老金（不受该政策影响）覆盖的工人进行比较。该政策与50岁（女性提前退休年龄）、55岁（男性提前退休年龄）和65岁（所有工人正常退休年龄）退休概率的增加相关。我们还发现，在40多岁女性和50岁出头男性中，正规部门就业有所增加，这与为获得提前退休资格（需要近期缴纳养老金）而增加的努力相一致。该政策的影响集中在受教育程度较低的工人中，他们更可能面临流动性约束。

32379.title: Inflation Preferences
32379.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Alexander Dietrich, Kristian Myrseth, Romanos Priftis, Raphael Schoenle
32379.abstract: We document novel survey-based facts on preferred long-run inflation rates among U.S. consumers. Consumers on average prefer a 0.20% annual inflation rate, considerably below the Federal Reserve’s 2% target. Inflation preferences not only correlate with demographic and socioeconomic characteristics, but also with economic reasoning. A randomized control trial reveals that two narratives based on economic models—describing how inflation lowers the real value of wages as well as money holdings—affect inflation preferences. While our results can inform the design of central bank communication on inflation targets, they also raise questions about the alignment between such targets and consumer preferences.
32379.zh_abstract: 我们记录了基于调查的美国消费者对长期通胀率偏好的新颖事实。消费者平均偏好0.20%的年通胀率，远低于美联储2%的目标。通胀偏好不仅与人口和社会经济特征相关，还与经济推理相关。一项随机对照试验表明，两种基于经济模型的叙述——描述通胀如何降低工资和货币持有的实际价值——会影响通胀偏好。虽然我们的结果可以为央行关于通胀目标的沟通设计提供信息，但它们也引发了关于此类目标与消费者偏好之间一致性的问题。

32378.title: The Provision of Information and Incentives in School Assignment Mechanisms
32378.zh_title: 学校分配机制中的信息与激励提供
32378.abstract: Research on centralized school assignment mechanisms often focuses on whether parents who participate in specific mechanisms are likely to truthfully report their preferences or engage in various costly strategic behaviors. However, a growing literature suggests that parents may not know enough about the school options available to them to form complete preference rankings. We develop a simple model that explains why it is not surprising that many participants in school assignment mechanisms possess limited information about the schools available to them. We then discuss policies that could improve both the information that participants bring to school assignment mechanisms and the quality of the schools in their choice sets.
32378.zh_abstract: 关于集中式学校分配机制的研究通常关注参与特定机制的家长是否可能真实报告其偏好，或从事各种代价高昂的策略行为。然而，越来越多的文献表明，家长可能对其可选择的学校了解不足，无法形成完整的偏好排序。我们开发了一个简单模型，解释了为什么许多学校分配机制的参与者对所提供学校的信息有限并不令人惊讶。然后，我们讨论了可以改善参与者带入学校分配机制的信息以及其选择集中学校质量的政策。

32377.title: Cities, Heterogeneous Firms, and Trade
32377.zh_title: 城市、异质性企业与贸易
32377.authors: Jan David Bakker, Alvaro Garcia Marin, Andrei V. Potlogea, Nico Voigtländer, Yang Yang
32377.abstract: Does international trade affect the growth of cities, and vice versa? Assembling disaggregate data for four countries, we document a novel stylized fact: Export activity is disproportionately concentrated in larger cities – even more so than overall economic activity. We rationalize this fact by marrying a standard quantitative spatial economics model with a heterogeneous firm model that features selection into the domestic and the export market. Our model delivers novel predictions for the bi-directional interactions between trade and urban dynamics: On the one hand, trade liberalization shifts employment towards larger cities, and on the other hand, liberalizing land use raises exports. We structurally estimate the model using Chinese and French firm-level data. We find that trade policies have quantitatively meaningful impacts on urban outcomes and vice versa, and that the aggregate effects of trade and urban policies differ from standard models that do not account for the interaction between trade and cities. In addition, a distinguishing prediction of our model – which we confirm in the data – is that local trade elasticities vary systematically with city size, so that a country’s aggregate trade elasticity depends on the spatial distribution of production within its borders.
32377.zh_abstract: 国际贸易是否影响城市增长，反之亦然？通过汇总四个国家的微观数据，我们记录了一个新颖的典型事实：出口活动不成比例地集中在较大的城市——甚至比整体经济活动更为集中。我们通过将一个标准的定量空间经济学模型与一个具有进入国内和出口市场选择特征的异质性企业模型相结合，来解释这一事实。我们的模型为贸易与城市动态之间的双向互动提供了新颖的预测：一方面，贸易自由化将就业转向更大的城市；另一方面，放松土地管制会提高出口。我们利用中国和法国的企业层面数据对模型进行了结构估计。我们发现，贸易政策对城市结果具有数量上显著的影响，反之亦然，并且贸易和城市政策的总体效应与不考虑贸易与城市之间相互作用的标准模型不同。此外，我们模型的一个显著预测——我们在数据中证实了这一点——是地方贸易弹性随城市规模系统性地变化，因此一个国家的总体贸易弹性取决于其境内生产的空间分布。

32376.title: Consumer-Financed Fiscal Stimulus: Evidence from Digital Coupons in China
32376.zh_title: 消费者融资的财政刺激：来自中国数字消费券的证据
32376.authors: Jing Ding, Lei Jiang, Lucy Msall, Matthew J. Notowidigdo
32376.abstract: In 2020, local governments in China began issuing digital coupons to stimulate spending in targeted categories such as restaurants and supermarkets. Using data from a large e-commerce platform and a bunching estimation approach, we find that the coupons caused large increases in spending of 3.1–3.3 yuan per yuan spent by the government. The large spending responses do not come from substitution away from non-targeted spending categories or from short-run intertemporal substitution. To rationalize these results, we develop a dynamic consumption model showing how coupons’ minimum spending thresholds create temporary notches that lead to large spending responses.
32376.zh_abstract: 2020年，中国地方政府开始发放数字消费券，以刺激餐饮和超市等目标类别的支出。利用来自大型电子商务平台的数据和聚束估计方法，我们发现消费券导致支出大幅增加，每花费政府1元人民币，支出增加3.1-3.3元人民币。巨大的支出反应并非来自非目标支出类别的替代，也非来自短期的跨期替代。为了合理化这些结果，我们开发了一个动态消费模型，展示了消费券的最低消费门槛如何创造临时的缺口，从而导致巨大的支出反应。

32375.title: Meritocracy across Countries
32375.zh_title: 各国精英体制的比较研究
32375.authors: Oriana Bandiera, Ananya Kotia, Ilse Lindenlaub, Christian Moser, Andrea Prat
32375.abstract: Are labor markets in higher-income countries more meritocratic, in the sense that worker-job matching is based on skills rather than idiosyncratic attributes unrelated to productivity? If so, why? And what are the aggregate consequences? Using internationally comparable data on worker skills and job skill requirements of over 120,000 individuals across 28 countries, we document that workers' skills better match their jobs' skill requirements in higher-income countries. To quantify the role of worker-job matching in development accounting, we build an equilibrium matching model that allows for cross-country differences in three fundamentals: (i) the endowments of multidimensional worker skills and job skill requirements, which determine match feasibility; (ii) technology, which determines the returns to matching; and (iii) idiosyncratic matching frictions, which capture the role of nonproductive worker and job traits in the matching process. The estimated model delivers two key insights. First, improvements in worker-job matching due to reduced matching frictions account for only a small share of cross-country income differences. Second, however, improved worker-job matching is crucial for unlocking the gains from economic development generated by adopting frontier endowments and technology.
32375.zh_abstract: 高收入国家的劳动力市场是否更具精英体制特征，即工人与工作的匹配基于技能而非与生产力无关的特殊属性？如果是，原因何在？其总体经济后果又是什么？利用涵盖28个国家超过12万人的国际可比工人技能与工作技能要求数据，我们记录到：在高收入国家，工人的技能与其工作的技能要求匹配度更高。为量化工人-工作匹配在发展核算中的作用，我们构建了一个均衡匹配模型，该模型允许各国在三个基本要素上存在差异：（i）多维工人技能与工作技能要求的禀赋，这决定了匹配的可行性；（ii）技术，它决定了匹配的回报；（iii）特殊匹配摩擦，它捕捉了非生产性工人与工作特征在匹配过程中的作用。估计模型得出了两个关键见解。首先，因匹配摩擦减少而带来的工人-工作匹配改善，仅能解释跨国收入差异的一小部分。其次，然而，改善工人-工作匹配对于释放由采用前沿禀赋和技术所带来的经济发展收益至关重要。
32375.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：C78, E24, J24, J31, O11, O12

32374.title: Why Does Working from Home Vary Across Countries and People?
32374.zh_title: 为何居家办公在不同国家和人群间存在差异？
32374.authors: Pablo Zarate, Mathias Dolls, Steven J. Davis, Nicholas Bloom, Jose Maria Barrero, Cevat Giray Aksoy
32374.abstract: We use two surveys to assess why work from home (WFH) varies so much across countries and people. A measure of cultural individualism accounts for about one-third of the cross-country variation in WFH rates. Australia, Canada, the UK, and the US score highly on individualism and WFH rates, whereas Asian countries score low on both. Other factors such as cumulative lockdown stringency, population density, industry mix, and GDP per capita also matter, but they account for less of the variation. When looking across individual workers in the United States, we find that industry mix, population density and lockdown severity help account for current WFH rates, as does the partisan leaning of the county in which the worker resides. We conclude that multiple factors influence WFH rates, and technological feasibility is only one of them.
32374.zh_abstract: 我们利用两项调查来评估为何居家办公（WFH）在不同国家和人群间差异如此之大。一项衡量文化个人主义的指标解释了约三分之一的跨国WFH率差异。澳大利亚、加拿大、英国和美国在个人主义和WFH率上得分较高，而亚洲国家在这两方面得分均较低。其他因素，如累计封锁严格程度、人口密度、行业结构和人均GDP，也很重要，但它们解释的差异较少。在考察美国个体工人时，我们发现行业结构、人口密度和封锁严重程度有助于解释当前的WFH率，工人所在县的党派倾向也是如此。我们得出结论：多种因素影响WFH率，技术可行性只是其中之一。
32374.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：E0, G0, L0

32373.title: Estimating Racial Disparities When Race is Not Observed
32373.zh_title: 当种族信息未被观测时如何估计种族差异
32373.authors: Cory McCartan, Robin Fisher, Jacob Goldin, Daniel E. Ho, Kosuke Imai
32373.abstract: The estimation of racial disparities in various fields is often hampered by the lack of individual-level racial information. In many cases, the law prohibits the collection of such information to prevent direct racial discrimination. As a result, analysts have frequently adopted Bayesian Improved Surname Geocoding (BISG) and its variants, which combine individual names and addresses with Census data to predict race. Unfortunately, the residuals of BISG are often correlated with the outcomes of interest, generally attenuating estimates of racial disparities. To correct this bias, we propose an alternative identification strategy under the assumption that surname is conditionally independent of the outcome given (unobserved) race, residence location, and other observed characteristics. We introduce a new class of models, Bayesian Instrumental Regression for Disparity Estimation (BIRDiE), that take BISG probabilities as inputs and produce racial disparity estimates by using surnames as an instrumental variable for race. Our estimation method is scalable, making it possible to analyze large-scale administrative data. We also show how to address potential violations of the key identification assumptions. A validation study based on the North Carolina voter file shows that BISG+BIRDiE reduces error by up to 84% when estimating racial differences in party registration. Finally, we apply the proposed methodology to estimate racial differences in who benefits from the home mortgage interest deduction using individual-level tax data from the U.S. Internal Revenue Service. Open-source software is available which implements the proposed methodology.
32373.zh_abstract: 在各个领域中，种族差异的估计常常因缺乏个体层面的种族信息而受阻。在许多情况下，法律禁止收集此类信息以防止直接的种族歧视。因此，分析人员经常采用贝叶斯改进姓氏地理编码（BISG）及其变体，该方法将个人姓名和地址与人口普查数据相结合来预测种族。不幸的是，BISG的残差通常与感兴趣的结果相关，这通常会减弱种族差异的估计值。为纠正此偏差，我们提出了一种替代识别策略，其假设是：在给定（未观测的）种族、居住地点和其他观测特征的情况下，姓氏与结果条件独立。我们引入了一类新模型，即用于差异估计的贝叶斯工具回归（BIRDiE），该模型以BISG概率为输入，通过使用姓氏作为种族的工具变量来产生种族差异估计。我们的估计方法具有可扩展性，使得分析大规模行政数据成为可能。我们还展示了如何处理关键识别假设的潜在违反。基于北卡罗来纳州选民档案的验证研究表明，在估计政党登记的种族差异时，BISG+BIRDiE将误差减少了高达84%。最后，我们应用所提出的方法，利用美国国税局的个体层面税收数据，估计了谁从住房抵押贷款利息扣除中受益的种族差异。提供开源软件以实现所提出的方法。

32372.title: Transparency and Percent Plans
32372.abstract: Transparency vs. opacity is an important dimension of college admission policy. Colleges may gain useful information from a holistic review of applicants’ materials, but in doing so may contribute to uncertainty that discourages potential applicants with poor information. This paper investigates the impacts of admissions transparency in the context of Texas’ Top Ten Percent Plan, using survey and administrative data from Texas and a model of college applications, admissions, enrollment, grades, and persistence. I estimate that two thirds of the plan’s 9.1 point impact on top-decile students’ probability of attending a flagship university was due to information rather than mechanical effects. Students induced to enroll are more likely to come from low- income high schools, and academically outperform the students that they displace. These effects would be larger if complemented by financial-aid information, and are driven by transparency, not misalignment between the rules used for automatic and discretionary admissions.
32372.zh_abstract: 透明度与不透明性是大学录取政策的一个重要维度。大学可能通过对申请者材料进行全面审查来获取有用信息，但这样做可能会增加不确定性，从而阻碍信息匮乏的潜在申请者。本文利用德克萨斯州的调查和行政数据，以及一个涵盖大学申请、录取、入学、成绩和持续就读的模型，研究了在德克萨斯州前百分之十计划的背景下，录取透明度的影响。我估计，该计划对前十分之一学生进入旗舰大学概率产生的9.1个百分点影响中，有三分之二是由信息效应而非机械效应造成的。被诱导入学的学生更有可能来自低收入高中，并且他们在学业上优于被他们取代的学生。如果辅以经济援助信息，这些效应会更大，并且这些效应是由透明度驱动的，而非自动录取与酌情录取规则之间的错位。

32371.title: Labor Market Externalities of Pre-retirement Employment Protection
32371.zh_title: 退休前就业保护对劳动力市场的外部性
32371.authors: Paweł Chrostek, Krzysztof Karbownik, Michał Myck
32371.abstract: Using population-level administrative data, we study labor market externalities stemming from age-specific employment protection legislation (EPL) targeted towards older workers. Our results show no economically meaningful overall effects of the EPL on employment or earnings of either men or women approaching eligibility. Considering separately incumbent workers and non-employees we find small positive and small negative employment effects for the former and the latter groups, respectively.
32371.zh_abstract: 利用人口层面的行政数据，我们研究了针对老年工人的特定年龄就业保护立法（EPL）所产生的劳动力市场外部性。我们的结果显示，该就业保护立法对即将符合资格条件的男性和女性的就业或收入均未产生具有经济意义的总体影响。分别考虑在职员工和非雇员时，我们发现前者有微小的正向就业效应，后者则有微小的负向就业效应。

32370.title: The Evolution of Black-White Differences in Occupational Mobility Across Post-Civil War America
32370.zh_title: 内战后美国黑人与白人职业流动性差异的演变
32370.authors: Steven N. Durlauf, Gueyon Kim, Dohyeon Lee, Xi Song
32370.abstract: This paper studies long-run differences in intergenerational occupational mobility between Black and White Americans. Combining data from linked historical censuses and contemporary large-scale surveys, we provide a comprehensive set of mobility measures based on Markov chains that trace the short- and long-run dynamics of occupational differences. Our findings highlight the unique importance of changes in mobility experienced by the 1940–1950 birth cohort in shaping the current occupational distribution and reducing the racial occupational gap. We further explore the properties of continuing occupational inequalities and argue that these disparities are better understood by a lack of exchange mobility rather than structural mobility. Thus, contemporary occupational disparities cannot be expected to disappear based on the occupational dynamics seen historically.
32370.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国黑人与白人之间代际职业流动性的长期差异。通过结合关联的历史人口普查数据和当代大规模调查数据，我们基于马尔可夫链提供了一套全面的流动性衡量指标，用以追溯职业差异的短期和长期动态。我们的发现强调了1940-1950年出生队列所经历的流动性变化在塑造当前职业分布和缩小种族职业差距方面的独特重要性。我们进一步探讨了持续存在的职业不平等的特性，并认为这些差异最好被理解为缺乏交换流动性，而非结构性流动性。因此，根据历史上看到的职业动态，不能期望当代的职业差异会消失。

32369.title: Reforming Rotations
32369.authors: E. Jason Baron, Richard Lombardo, Joseph P. Ryan, Jeongsoo Suh, Quitze Valenzuela-Stookey
32369.abstract: In many settings, tasks are assigned to agents via a rotation. Such quasi-random allocation ignores heterogeneity in agents’ performance and preferences. We study how a designer can exploit such heterogeneity to improve aggregate performance while simultaneously ensuring that no agent is worse off relative to the status-quo system. The key challenge is that, while the designer may be able to estimate agents’ performance, their preferences are inherently unobservable. We develop a mechanism-design framework to study this problem and characterize optimal mechanisms in both static and dynamic settings. Optimal mechanisms can be interpreted as competitive equilibria in which agents trade tasks facing personalized, kinked budget sets. As an illustration, we apply our results to the assignment of Child Protective Services investigators to maltreatment cases. Simulations show that the mechanism reduces false positives (unnecessary foster care placements) by up to 14% while also lowering false negatives (missed maltreatment cases) and overall placements.
32369.zh_abstract: 在许多情境中，任务通过轮岗分配给代理人。这种准随机分配忽略了代理人在绩效和偏好上的异质性。我们研究设计者如何利用这种异质性来改善总体绩效，同时确保没有代理人的境况相对于现状系统变得更差。关键挑战在于，虽然设计者可能能够估计代理人的绩效，但他们的偏好本质上是不可观测的。我们开发了一个机制设计框架来研究这个问题，并在静态和动态环境中刻画了最优机制。最优机制可以解释为竞争均衡，其中代理人面对个性化的、有拐点的预算集来交易任务。作为示例，我们将我们的结果应用于儿童保护服务调查员对虐待案件的分配。模拟显示，该机制将误报（不必要的寄养安置）减少了高达14%，同时降低了漏报（遗漏的虐待案件）和总体安置数量。
32369.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：D82, H75, J13, J45

32368.title: New Gig Work or Changes in Reporting? Understanding Self-Employment Trends in Tax Data
32368.zh_title: 新零工经济还是报告方式的变化？理解税收数据中的自雇趋势
32368.authors: Andrew Garin, Emilie Jackson, Dmitri K. Koustas
32368.abstract: Rising self-employment rates in U.S. tax data that are absent in survey data have led to speculation that tax records capture a rise in new “gig” work that surveys miss. Drawing on the universe of IRS tax returns, we show that trends in firm-reported payments to “gig” and other contract workers do not explain the rise in self-employment reported to the IRS; rather, that increase is driven by self-reported earnings of individuals in the EITC phase-in range. We isolate pure reporting responses from real labor supply responses by examining births of workers’ first children around an end-of-year cutoff for credit eligibility that creates exogenous variation in tax rates at the end of the tax year after labor supply decisions are already sunk. We ﬁnd that ex-posing workers with sunk labor supply to negative marginal tax rates results in large increases in their propensity to self-report self-employment—only a small minority of which leads to bunching at kink-points. Consistent with pure strategic reporting behavior, we find no impact on reporting among taxpayers with no incentive to report additional income and no eﬀects on firm-reported payments of any kind. Moreover, we find these reporting responses have grown over time as knowledge of tax incentives has become widespread. Quantification exercises suggest that changes in taxpayer reporting behavior are a major driver of discrepancies between self-employment trends in self-reported and third-party reported data. Our findings suggest caution is warranted before deferring to self-reported tax data over other data sources when measuring labor market trends.
32368.zh_abstract: 美国税收数据中自雇率的上升（而调查数据中并未出现）引发了猜测，即税务记录捕捉到了调查所遗漏的新型“零工”工作的增长。利用美国国税局（IRS）的全部纳税申报表数据，我们表明，企业向“零工”及其他合同工报告的付款趋势并不能解释向IRS报告的自雇收入增长；相反，这一增长是由处于劳动所得税抵免（EITC）收入递增区间内的个人的自报收入所驱动的。我们通过考察工人第一个孩子出生时间（围绕一个年末截止日期，该截止日期用于确定信贷资格，从而在劳动供给决策已成定局后，在纳税年度末产生外生的税率变化）来分离纯粹的报告反应与真实的劳动供给反应。我们发现，让劳动供给已成定局的工人面临负的边际税率，会大幅增加他们自报自雇收入的倾向——其中只有极小部分导致了在拐点处的聚集。与纯粹的策略性报告行为一致，我们发现，对于没有动机报告额外收入的纳税人，报告行为没有影响，并且对企业报告的任何类型的付款也没有影响。此外，我们发现这些报告反应随着时间的推移而增长，因为对税收激励的了解已变得普遍。量化分析表明，纳税人报告行为的变化是自报数据与第三方报告数据中自雇趋势差异的主要驱动因素。我们的发现表明，在衡量劳动力市场趋势时，在依赖自报税收数据而非其他数据来源之前应保持谨慎。
32368.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：H26, J21, J41, J46, J82

32358.title: Slow Learning
32358.authors: Lawrence Christiano, Martin S. Eichenbaum, Benjamin K. Johannsen
32358.abstract: This paper analytically characterizes the speed of convergence under learning to a rational expectations equilibrium (REE) for a large class of multivariate models in which people’s beliefs about model outcomes are central determinants of those outcomes. The paper then investigates what features of an economy determine whether convergence under learning is fast or slow. We do so by applying our analytic results to the New Keynesian model and studying the impact of the Zero Lower Bound (ZLB) on the speed of convergence to a REE. Under certain circumstances, convergence of a learning equilibrium to the REE equilibrium can be so slow that policy analysis based on rational expectations is very misleading.
32358.zh_abstract: 本文对一大类多元模型在学习过程中向理性预期均衡收敛的速度进行了分析性刻画。在这类模型中，人们对模型结果的信念是这些结果的核心决定因素。随后，本文探究了经济体的哪些特征决定了学习收敛是快速还是缓慢。我们通过将分析结果应用于新凯恩斯模型，并研究零下限对收敛至理性预期均衡速度的影响来展开分析。在某些情况下，学习均衡向理性预期均衡的收敛可能极其缓慢，以至于基于理性预期的政策分析会产生严重误导。

32399.title: A Computable Dynamic Oligopoly Model of Capacity Investment
32399.zh_title: 一个可计算的产能投资动态寡头模型
32399.abstract: We analyze a class of dynamic models that has several recent applications, where each period, each firm receives a private shock to the marginal cost of investment and chooses among many ordered capacity levels. Simulation methods to compute these models can result in non-existence of pure strategy equilibrium, while including multinomial shocks leads to counterintuitive predictions. We provide a computationally fast method to calculate optimal investment probabilities given value functions that iteratively finds investment levels chosen with positive probability and cutoffs of private information shocks across choices. Our method is useful to practitioners seeking to estimate models with continuous firm choices.
32399.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一类在近期多个应用中出现的动态模型，其中每个时期，每家企业都会收到一个关于投资边际成本的私人冲击，并在多个有序的产能水平中进行选择。模拟这些模型的计算方法可能导致纯策略均衡不存在，而包含多项冲击则会导致反直觉的预测。我们提供了一种计算快速的方法，在给定价值函数的情况下计算最优投资概率，该方法迭代地找出以正概率选择的投资水平以及跨选择的私人信息冲击临界值。我们的方法对于寻求估计具有连续企业选择的模型的实践者很有用。

32398.title: Taxes Depress Corporate Borrowing: Evidence from Private Firms
32398.zh_title: 税收抑制企业借贷：来自私营企业的证据
32398.authors: Ivan T. Ivanov, Luke Pettit, Toni Whited
32398.abstract: We use variation in state corporate income tax rates to re-examine the relation between taxes and corporate leverage. Contrary to prior research, we find that corporate leverage rises after tax cuts for small private firms. An estimated dynamic equilibrium model shows that tax cuts make capital more productive and spur borrowing. Tax cuts also produce more distant default thresholds and lower credit spreads. These effects outweigh the lower interest tax deduction and lead to higher optimal leverage choices, especially for firms with flexible investment policies. The presence of the interest tax deduction raises consumer welfare in equilibrium.
32398.zh_abstract: 我们利用州企业所得税税率的变化来重新审视税收与企业杠杆之间的关系。与先前研究相反，我们发现对于小型私营企业，减税后企业杠杆率上升。一个估计的动态均衡模型表明，减税使资本更具生产力并刺激借贷。减税还导致更远的违约阈值和更低的信用利差。这些效应超过了较低的利息税抵扣，并导致更高的最优杠杆选择，尤其是对于投资政策灵活的企业。利息税抵扣的存在在均衡中提高了消费者福利。

32397.title: Quality Signaling and Demand for Renewable Energy Technology: Evidence from a Randomized Field Experiment
32397.zh_title: 质量信号与可再生能源技术需求：来自随机田野实验的证据
32397.authors: Aidan Coville, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Arndt Reichert, Ann-Kristin Reitmann
32397.abstract: Solar technologies have been associated with private and social returns, but their technological potential often remains unachieved because of persistently low demand for high-quality products. In a randomized field experiment in Senegal, we assess the potential of three types of quality signaling to increase demand for high-quality solar lamps. We find no effect on demand when consumers are offered a money-back guarantee but increased demand with a third-party certification or warranty, consistent with the notion that consumers are uncertain about product durability rather than their utility. However, despite the higher willingness to pay, the prices they would pay are still well below market prices for the average household, suggesting that reducing information asymmetries alone is insufficient to encourage wider adoption. Surprisingly, we also find that the effective quality signals in our setting stimulate demand for low-quality products by creating product-class effects among those least familiar with the product.
32397.zh_abstract: 太阳能技术一直与私人和社会回报相关联，但由于对高质量产品的需求持续低迷，其技术潜力往往未能实现。在塞内加尔的一项随机田野实验中，我们评估了三种质量信号类型在增加对高质量太阳能灯需求方面的潜力。我们发现，当消费者获得退款保证时，对需求没有影响，但第三方认证或保修增加了需求，这与消费者对产品耐用性而非效用存在不确定性的观点一致。然而，尽管支付意愿更高，他们愿意支付的价格仍远低于普通家庭的市场价格，这表明仅减少信息不对称不足以鼓励更广泛的采用。令人惊讶的是，我们还发现，在我们的环境中有效的质量信号通过在最不熟悉该产品的人群中创造产品类别效应，刺激了对低质量产品的需求。
32397.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：D12, D83, L15, O13, Q41

32396.title: Incentive-Compatible Unemployment Reinsurance for the Euro Area
32396.zh_title: 欧元区激励相容的失业保险再保险机制
32396.authors: Alexander Karaivanov, Benoit Mojon, Luiz Pereira da Silva, Albert Pierres Tejada, Robert Townsend
32396.abstract: We model a reinsurance mechanism for the national unemployment insurance programs of euro area member states. The risk-sharing scheme we analyze is designed to smooth country-level unemployment risk and expenditures around each country’s median level, so that participation and contributions remain incentive-compatible at all times and there are no redistributionary transfers across countries. We show that, relative to the status quo, such scheme would have provided nearly perfect insurance of the euro area member states’ unemployment expenditures risk in the aftermath of the 2009 sovereign debt crisis if allowed to borrow up to 2 percent of the euro area GDP. Limiting, or not allowing borrowing by the scheme would have still provided significant smoothing of surpluses and deficits in the national unemployment insurance programs over the period 2000–2019.
32396.zh_abstract: 我们为欧元区成员国的国家失业保险计划建模了一个再保险机制。我们分析的风险分担方案旨在平滑各国围绕其中位数水平的国家层面失业风险和支出，使得参与和贡献在任何时候都保持激励相容，并且各国之间不存在再分配性转移。我们表明，相对于现状，如果该方案被允许借款高达欧元区GDP的2%，那么在2009年主权债务危机之后，它将为欧元区成员国的失业支出风险提供近乎完美的保险。限制或不允许该方案借款，仍将在2000-2019年期间为国家失业保险计划中的盈余和赤字提供显著的平滑作用。

32395.title: Access to Credit Reduces the Value of Insurance
32395.zh_title: 信贷获取降低了保险的价值
32395.authors: Sonia Jaffe, Anup Malani, Julian Reif
32395.abstract: We analyze the value of insurance when individuals have access to credit markets. Loans allow consumers to smooth financial shocks over time, decreasing the value of consumption smoothing from insurance. We derive formulas for the value of insurance that can be taken to data, and show how that value depends on individual characteristics and features of loans. We estimate that access to a five-year loan decreases the values of community- and experience-rated insurance for the average beneficiary by $\$232$-$\$366$ (58--61%). Even for the sickest decile, this loan access reduces the value of community-rated insurance by $\$1,099$ (17%).
32395.zh_abstract: 我们分析了当个人能够进入信贷市场时保险的价值。贷款允许消费者随时间平滑财务冲击，从而降低了保险带来的消费平滑价值。我们推导了可用于数据的保险价值公式，并展示了该价值如何取决于个人特征和贷款特性。我们估计，获得五年期贷款会使社区评级和经验评级保险对平均受益人的价值降低232-366美元（58-61%）。即使对于最病重的十分位人群，这种贷款获取也会使社区评级保险的价值降低1,099美元（17%）。

32394.title: Can you Erase the Mark of a Criminal Record? Labor Market Impacts of Criminal Record Remediation
32394.zh_title: 你能抹去犯罪记录的印记吗？犯罪记录修复的劳动力市场影响
32394.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Andrew Garin, Dmitri K. Koustas, Alexandre Mas, Crystal Yang
32394.abstract: We investigate whether removing a previously-obtained criminal record improves employment outcomes. We estimate the causal impact of criminal record remediation laws that have been widely enacted with the goal of improving employment opportunities for millions of individuals with records. We find consistent evidence that removing an existing record does not improve labor market outcomes, on average. A notable exception is participation in gig work through online platforms, which often screen workers based on their records but not their employment histories. The evidence is consistent with records initially scarring labor market trajectories in a way that is difficult to undo later.
32394.zh_abstract: 我们调查了移除先前获得的犯罪记录是否能改善就业结果。我们估计了犯罪记录修复法律的因果影响，这些法律已被广泛颁布，旨在改善数百万有记录个人的就业机会。我们发现一致的证据表明，平均而言，移除现有记录并不能改善劳动力市场结果。一个显著的例外是通过在线平台参与零工工作，这些平台通常根据记录而非就业历史筛选工人。证据与记录最初以难以日后逆转的方式损害劳动力市场轨迹的观点一致。

32393.title: International Reserve Management under Rollover Crises
32393.zh_title: 展期危机下的国际储备管理
32393.authors: Mauricio Barbosa-Alves, Javier Bianchi, César Sosa-Padilla
32393.abstract: This paper investigates how a government should manage international reserves when it faces the risk of a rollover crisis. We ask, should the government accumulate reserves or reduce debt to make itself less vulnerable? We show that the optimal policy entails initially reducing debt, followed by a subsequent increase in both debt and reserves as the government approaches a safe zone. Furthermore, we find that issuing additional debt to accumulate reserves can lead to a reduction in sovereign spreads. Evidence from a panel of emerging economies is consistent with these predictions: increases in reserves financed by public external borrowing are associated with lower spreads, and reserve holdings are not systematically drawn down during crisis episodes.
32393.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当政府面临展期危机风险时，应如何管理国际储备。我们提出疑问：政府应积累储备还是减少债务以降低自身脆弱性？研究表明，最优政策是先减少债务，随后在政府接近安全区域时同时增加债务和储备。此外，我们发现发行额外债务以积累储备可导致主权利差下降。来自新兴经济体的面板数据与这些预测一致：通过公共外部借款融资的储备增加与较低的利差相关，且在危机期间储备持有量并未系统性减少。

32392.title: Contingent Trade Agreements
32392.abstract: There are often conflicts between proponents of trade and environmental activists. This paper shows, however, how trade agreements can be designed so as to motivate environmental conservation. I first analyze a standard trade model, where resource exploitation (e.g., deforestation) is a trade-specific investment that causes environmental damage. In this model, traditional trade agreements will cause more exploitation. Next, I investigate the extent to which conservation can be motivated by a contingent trade agreement (CTA), where default tariffs can vary with changes in the resource stock (e.g., the forest cover). The model permits many products, countries, and collaborators. A numerical example suggests that growth and liberalization can cause Brazil's agricultural area to expand by 27%, but this expansion can be avoided if the EU and the US offer a CTA.
32392.zh_abstract: 贸易支持者与环保活动家之间常存在冲突。然而，本文展示了如何设计贸易协定以激励环境保护。我首先分析了一个标准贸易模型，其中资源开采（如森林砍伐）是一种造成环境损害的贸易特定投资。在该模型中，传统贸易协定会导致更多开采。接着，我研究了通过或有贸易协定（CTA）能在多大程度上激励保护行为，在该协定中，默认关税可随资源存量（如森林覆盖率）的变化而调整。该模型允许多种产品、国家和合作方。一个数值示例表明，增长与自由化可能导致巴西农业面积扩大27%，但如果欧盟和美国提供CTA，这种扩张可以避免。
